wordpress-reviewer.description: Expert WordPress code reviewer specializing in WPCS, security vulnerabilities, performance issues, hooks usage, and best practices. Use after writing or modifying WordPress code.

wordpress-build-resolver.description: WordPress build and debug error resolution specialist. Fixes PHP errors, WordPress deprecation notices, plugin conflicts, database errors, and WooCommerce issues.

theme-reviewer.description: WordPress theme specialist reviewer. Reviews theme hierarchy, Customizer, widgets, accessibility, performance, and child theme compatibility.

plugin-reviewer.description: WordPress plugin specialist reviewer. Reviews plugin structure, hooks, Settings API, custom post types, database operations, and security.

wp-theme.description: Start WordPress theme development workflow with hierarchy validation, Customizer setup, and accessibility checks

wp-plugin.description: Start WordPress plugin development workflow with structure setup, hooks registration, and security implementation

wp-review.description: Comprehensive WordPress code review for security, performance, coding standards, and best practices

wp-build-fix.description: Fix WordPress build errors, runtime errors, deprecation notices, and debugging issues

wc-build.description: WooCommerce-specific development workflow for products, orders, cart, payment gateways, and shipping methods
